message:
fix: skip chunk prefetch on /login to prevent chunk_load errors during OAuth (#9768)

During OAuth redirect flow, the route chunk prefetch fires on /login
500ms after page load. The browser navigates away before chunks finish
downloading, causing chunk_load errors (4 hits today per GA4). Skip
prefetching on /login and /auth/callback since these are transient
pages — the user will be redirected to the dashboard where prefetch
runs normally.

Fixes #9767

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
